testcase.name: schema_is_up_to_date
all_baseline_migrations_applied
migration_history_contains_baseline_migrations
document_flyway_best_practices
testcase.system-out:
[DAY 40] FLYWAY BEST PRACTICES:
NAMING: V{version}__{description}.sql EXAMPLES: V1__baseline_schema.sql V2__add_audit_log.sql V3__add_product_category_column.sql R__create_reporting_views.sql (repeatable)
RULES: 1. NEVER edit an applied migration. 2. NEVER delete migration files. 3. Set clean-disabled=true in production. 4. Test on staging before production. 5. Checksum mismatch → startup fails (Flyway protection).
SPRING BOOT: Flyway runs before Hibernate validates schema. Order: Flyway apply → Hibernate validate → App start → @Transactional code

testcase.name: current_version_is_latest
